sections.section_purpose: To describe the technical approach to meet the stated requirements.

sections.section_purpose: To provide a description of the proposed solution architecture.

sections.response_guidance: Describe the service management framework, including ITSM processes, SLAs, and escalation paths.

sections.section_purpose: To provide a summary of the company's background, size, structure, and relevance to this opportunity.

sections.section_purpose: To provide case studies demonstrating relevant experience.
sections.response_guidance: Provide two or more case studies demonstrating relevant experience. Reference case study files from `case_studies/`.

sections.section_purpose: To complete the pricing schedule as specified in the tender.
